backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing user profiles, mood tracking, and journaling with per-user storage and timestamped entries, protected by role-based access control. Exposes query and update methods for profiles, moods, and journal CRUD operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two frontend features related to updating the Testimonials page background image and adding it as a static asset, including affected files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-style document summarizing the purpose and behavior of major frontend files, components, hooks, pages, and configuration used across the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS setup defining design tokens, OKLCH color variables, and light/dark theme palettes applied across the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point configuring metadata, favicon, Google Fonts, and mounting the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling authentication state, hash-based routing for public pages, authenticated navigation, loading states, and profile setup gating.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog shown to new authenticated users that collects and saves a required display name before allowing app usage.
frontend/src/components/GreenButton.tsx: Reusable button wrapper that enforces consistent green primary styling on top of the base UI Button component.
frontend/src/components/journal/JournalE: Form component for creating or editing journal entries, managing local state and invoking add or update mutations with consistent green-styled actions.
frontend/src/components/journal/JournalL: Fetches and displays a list of journal entries with loading and empty states, formatting timestamps for display. Provides edit and delete actions per entry, including a confirmation dialog for deletion.
frontend/src/components/journal/JournalS: Container component that manages journal view state, switching between the journal list and the journal editor for creating or editing entries.
frontend/src/components/landing/FAQSecti: Renders a landing-page FAQ section using an accordion with common questions and answers about privacy, therapy, usage, and subscriptions.
frontend/src/components/landing/FeatureA: Displays landing-page feature cards and benefit lists highlighting app tools and user outcomes, organized into features and benefits sections.
frontend/src/components/landing/HeroSect: Landing-page hero section with core messaging, introductory copy, and a primary call-to-action to begin using the app.
frontend/src/components/landing/LandingC: Reusable call-to-action button that triggers Internet Identity login and shows a loading state during sign-in.
frontend/src/components/landing/LandingH: Sticky landing-page header showing the app logo/title and a sign-in button wired to Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/landing/LandingS: Layout utility component that wraps landing-page sections with consistent spacing, optional IDs, and custom class names.
frontend/src/components/landing/PricingS: Renders the pricing plans section with free, basic, and premier tiers, listing features and providing CTAs to start or upgrade.
frontend/src/components/landing/PrivacyS: Landing page section highlighting privacy, security, and safety commitments with feature cards, crisis notice, and disclaimers about not replacing professional care.
frontend/src/components/landing/SocialPr: Landing page section showing testimonials, empathetic messaging, and a CTA button that navigates to a testimonials/feedback section.
frontend/src/components/landing/ValuePro: Landing page section presenting the app’s core value proposition, emotional messaging, and key differentiators like trauma-aware tools and privacy.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main authenticated app layout with header navigation, user info, logout handling, content container, and footer, wrapped in a sanctuary-themed background.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sanctuary: Background wrapper that cycles through preloaded sanctuary images with timed crossfade transitions and a translucent overlay for readability.
frontend/src/components/mood/MoodCheckIn: Dashboard card allowing users to record their current mood, submit it via hooks, and view a recent mood history list.
frontend/src/components/tools/BreathingT: A guided breathing exercise component with inhale/hold/exhale/rest phases, countdown timer, cycle tracking, and start/pause/reset controls.
frontend/src/components/tools/Grounding5: Implements a step-by-step 5-4-3-2-1 grounding exercise with prompts, optional user responses, progress indicators, and completion state.
frontend/src/components/tools/ThoughtRef: A CBT-style thought reframing tool that collects a negative thought, displays guiding questions, and allows writing a more balanced replacement thought.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Provides a React Query-powered hook to create and cache an authenticated or anonymous backend actor tied to Internet Identity, and refresh dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Hooks to fetch and save the current caller’s user profile via the backend actor, handling loading state and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Defines an Internet Identity context and provider that manages authentication state, login/logout, and identity persistence using Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useJournal.ts: CRUD hooks for journal entries that fetch, add, update, and delete entries through the backend actor with React Query caching.
frontend/src/hooks/useMood.ts: Hooks to retrieve mood history and submit new mood entries to the backend, with cache invalidation on updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Hooks for fetching testimonials and submitting new ones via the backend actor, using React Query for state and cache management.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base, component, and utility layers with extensive CSS variables for a calm color palette, light/dark themes, typography, and global styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, setting up React Query and Internet Identity context providers before rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page layout showing a welcome header, mood check-in card, and journal section arranged in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page composed of multiple sections (hero, features, pricing, FAQ, privacy) wrapped in a themed background with a footer.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Full-page testimonials view with background imagery, a header, a submission form, and fetched testimonials managed via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ToolsPage.tsx: Self-help tools page using tabbed navigation to present breathing, grounding, and thought reframing exercises.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions to read URL parameters from query or hash, persist them in sessionStorage, and safely retrieve or clear them.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, typography, spacing, animations, and plugins, with support for CSS variable–driven light/dark themes.
project_state.json: Project metadata and state snapshot defining schema/version and a high-level summary of an ICP canister-based mental wellness web app. Enumerates existing features with IDs, descriptions, and versions covering auth, frontend pages/components, Motoko backend auth, integration scaffolding, and build/deploy assets.
